summary: Generated one strong DinoBrain suggestion based on fresh local git and GitHub evidence. The only candidate that clearly passed the why-user/why-now/why-Codex/not-already-handled bar was landing PR #1, because the hook-fix branch is still open from 2026-07-03 while main advanced to v0.1.7 without it.
decisions: Used DinoBrain task/context preflight before analysis per AGENTS.md.
Relied on local git state plus GitHub PR metadata as the strongest recent evidence.
Discarded weaker candidates because Gmail search lacked scope, Calendar had no DinoBrain events, and the observatory branch was already contained in main.
next_steps: If the user clicks the suggestion, merge or cherry-pick PR #1 onto main, run hook verification, and prepare the next installer/release.
